title: Immersive Flashlights
description: Minecraft mod that adds Immersive Flashlights using the Veil API
body:
# Immersive Flashlights

This mod adds a simple early-game flashlight, completely compatible with multiplayer, it can be turned on and off and has no bloat features such as battery life and such.


![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/066226fccd051b6ad4fc4de3c96b956ab3c5c9d9.png)

The Crafting recipe is really cheap!

<big>⚠️**Relies on the Veil API only version 2.1.1 will work, avoid newer versions.**⚠️</big>
![Veil logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c507ac9b29dcf0bcd14bb5296a4dc4442d891c0.webp)

<big>**Recommended to be played alongside any True Darkness mod.**</big>
![True Darkness Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2409a894c04127e46360ede31370647a3cb881e5_0.webp)

Any issues or questions, feel free to contact me on Discord: shen79
